name: gmodbench-website
description: Website for gmodbench.com — compare AI models for Garry's Mod coding

scripts.cf:dev: bun run build && wrangler dev --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.cf:deploy: bun run build && wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.verify: bun run check && bun run build && bun run scripts/verify-worker.ts
